message:
Add multi-user support to session-explorer backend

Add user column to projects/sessions tables, multi-user directory
discovery (discoverUsers, discoverUserProjects, detectLayout), multi-user
import path (importMultiUserDataDir), user-filtered queries (getUsers,
filtered getProjects/getAllSessions/searchSessions), and auto-detection
of single-user vs multi-user data layout in initDb.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
